source.description: International Best Track Archive for Climate Stewardship (IBTrACS) - the most complete global dataset of tropical cyclones. Includes hurricanes, typhoons, and cyclones from all ocean basins with track positions, intensity, and wind radii data.

datasets.storms.parquet: Storm-level records with name, basin, max intensity, and track summary
datasets.positions.parquet: 6-hourly track positions with wind speed, pressure, and wind radii

metrics.wind_kt: Maximum sustained wind speed in knots
metrics.r34_ne: Radius of 34kt winds in NE quadrant (nautical miles)
metrics.r34_se: Radius of 34kt winds in SE quadrant
metrics.r34_sw: Radius of 34kt winds in SW quadrant
metrics.r34_nw: Radius of 34kt winds in NW quadrant
metrics.r50_ne: Radius of 50kt winds in NE quadrant
metrics.r50_se: Radius of 50kt winds in SE quadrant
metrics.r50_sw: Radius of 50kt winds in SW quadrant
metrics.r50_nw: Radius of 50kt winds in NW quadrant
metrics.r64_ne: Radius of 64kt winds in NE quadrant
metrics.r64_se: Radius of 64kt winds in SE quadrant
metrics.r64_sw: Radius of 64kt winds in SW quadrant
metrics.r64_nw: Radius of 64kt winds in NW quadrant

data_quality_notes: Pre-satellite era (before 1966) may have incomplete tracks
Wind radii data available primarily from 2004 onward
source_agency indicates which agency provided the best track data
Category based on Saffir-Simpson scale for Atlantic/E.Pacific, equivalent for other basins
